fields.title: Title of the report
fields.abstract_summary: Summary of the abstract or executive summary

fields.skills: List of technical or professional skills

fields.sender: Name or department sending the memo
fields.recipient: Name or department receiving the memo
fields.subject: Subject line
fields.action_items: List of required actions or requests

fields.label_text: Text written on the folder tab or cover
fields.department: Department or category associated with the folder
fields.year: Year associated with the folder contents
fields.color: Visual color of the folder if distinguishable

fields.project_name: Name of the project or product

fields.headline: Main headline of the article
fields.publication_source: Name of the newspaper or website
fields.author: Name of the journalist or author
fields.topic: Main topic or category (e.g., Politics, Sports, Tech)

fields.form_title: Title or header of the form
fields.person_name: Name of the person filling the form
fields.submission_date: Date the form was filled or signed
fields.is_signed: Boolean indicating if a signature is present

fields.period_start: Start date of the budget period
fields.period_end: End date of the budget period
fields.department: Department or project the budget belongs to

fields.transcription: Full text transcription of the handwriting
fields.sentiment: Sentiment of the content (Positive, Negative, Neutral)
fields.writer_name: Name of the writer if identifiable

fields.subject: Subject line
fields.body_summary: Summary of the email body content

fields.vendor_name: Name of the vendor or seller

fields.title: Title of the presentation
fields.presenter: Name of the presenter or author
fields.event_name: Name of the event or meeting context
fields.key_takeaways: List of key points or summary

fields.response_type: Type of responses (e.g., Multiple Choice, Open text)

fields.product_name: Name of the product or service
fields.headline: Main promotional headline
fields.offer_details: Details of any discount or offer
fields.call_to_action: The primary action requested (e.g., Buy Now, Visit Website)

fields.ceo: Name of the CEO of the company

fields.quarter: Quarter of the report (Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4)
fields.ceo: Name of the CEO of the company
fields.net_income_previous_year_millions: Net income of previous year in million dollars

fields.summary: Brief summary of the document content
fields.suggested_category: A suggested category if none of the above fit
fields.entity_names: List of major entities (people, orgs) found

classes.handwritten: Document entirely handwritten. Process this before other classes
classes.budget: Financial forecasts, spreadsheets, or internal expenditure authorizations. IF the document is a fill-in-the-blank form requesting or authorizing money (e.g., 'Contribution Request', 'Account Code', 'Amount: $'), classify as budget. EXCLUDE: Do NOT classify as invoice unless it is a final bill from an external vendor.
classes.invoice: Definitive demand for payment for goods/services already delivered. Look for 'Remit To', 'Net 30', 'Terms', 'Tax ID', or 'Please Pay'. If it is an external bill, it is an invoice, even if it has form-like boxes. EXCLUDE: Do NOT classify as budget.
classes.specification: Detailed technical, engineering, or architectural requirements. Look for section numbers (e.g., 1.1, 1.2), blueprints, materials lists, or strict technical constraints. IF it is a technical checklist or engineering form, classify as specification, NOT form.
classes.memo: Internal office correspondence. Look for a strict, block-style header at the top containing 'TO:', 'FROM:', 'DATE:', and 'SUBJECT:' (or 'RE:'). EXCLUDE: If the document starts with a conversational salutation like 'Dear [Name]', it is NOT a memo. Classify as letter instead.
classes.presentation: Official corporate communications or media press releases
classes.news_article: Clipping from a newspaper, magazine, or journal
classes.letter: Typed correspondence, usually external. Visually characterized by formal salutations ('Dear...', 'To Whom It May Concern') and sign-offs at the bottom ('Sincerely', 'Cordially', 'Best Regards'). EXCLUDE: If the document uses a rigid 'TO / FROM / SUBJECT' block header, classify as memo instead.
classes.form: Administrative data collection documents featuring blank lines, checkboxes, or fax cover sheets. EXTREME EXCLUSION: If the document contains prices, 'Account Code', authorizes spending, or contains technical engineering data, do NOT classify as form. Classify as budget, invoice, or specification instead.
